meta.question: Find any L3 APT requirements that currently lack a satisfy or verify link.
meta.finalAnswer:
There are **38 L3 APT requirements** that currently lack a satisfy or verify link:

1. FOV
2. Nighttime power to air inside the Enclosure
3. Coolant Temperatures
4. Plate scale
5. CCD Full Read Out Rate
6. CCD ROI Read Out Rate
7. Image quality
8. Plate scale distortion (full field)
9. Plate scale distortion (central field)
10. Publish camera frames
11. Low signal exposures
12. High signal exposures
13. 100Hz focus mode
14. Accommodate LOWFS
15. Coolant Pressure
16. Max. Pressure Drop of Coolant
17. Glycol used at Nasmyth
18. Mass Allocation
19. Standby to Operating in 1 min
20. OFF to Standby in 24 hours
21. Common Requirements
22. empty1

24. empty3
25. empty4
26. empty5
27. empty6
28. empty7
29. empty8
30. empty9
31. REQ-3-???-0010

These requirements are located in the path: `TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Black Box Specification::Requirements::04 APS L3 Requirements::L3 APT Requirements`

Note: The model only contains 4 satisfy links in total, and they connect to different requirements (not L3 APT requirements). There are no verify links found in the model at all.

events.output: I'll help you find L3 APT requirements that lack satisfy or verify links. Let me start by exploring the model to find these requirements.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  ?req rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found requirements but need to specifically filter for L3 APT requirements and check for satisfy/verify links. Let me query for L3 APT requirements specifically.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("L3 APT")))
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?req)), LCASE("L3%20APT")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?req)), LCASE("L3%20APT")))
}
LIMIT 50

  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?req), "L3%20APT%20Requirements"))

request.reason: Found 38 L3 APT requirements. Now need to check which ones lack satisfy or verify links. Let me query for these relationships.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?pred WHERE {
  ?s ?pred ?o .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?pred)), "satisfy") || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?pred)), "verify"))
}
LIMIT 20

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?type WHERE {
  ?s rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?type)), "satisfy") || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?type)), "verify"))
}
LIMIT 20

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?linkType WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?req), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/tmt%20requirement/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::APS::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::Requirements::04%2520APS%2520L3%2520Requirements"))
  ?link rdf:type ?linkType .
  FILTER(?linkType = vocab:satisfy || ?linkType = vocab:verify)
  FILTER(?req = ?link || ?req IN (?link))
}
LIMIT 20

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?req), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/tmt%20requirement/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::APS::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::Requirements::04%2520APS%2520L3%2520Requirements"))
  ?req ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 30

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?target ?targetName WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?req), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/tmt%20requirement/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::APS::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::Requirements::04%2520APS%2520L3%2520Requirements"))
  ?req vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfSource ?link .
  ?link vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfTarget ?target .
  OPTIONAL { ?target vocab:NamedElement_name ?targetName }
}
LIMIT 20

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?link ?linkType WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?req), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/tmt%20requirement/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::APS::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::Requirements::04%2520APS%2520L3%2520Requirements"))
  ?req vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfSource ?link .
  ?link rdf:type ?linkType .
}
LIMIT 20

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?linkType WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?req), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/tmt%20requirement/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::APS::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::Requirements::04%2520APS%2520L3%2520Requirements"))
  ?req vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfSource ?link .
  ?link rdf:type ?linkType .
}
LIMIT 20

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?name ?linkType WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?req), "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/tmt%20requirement/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::01%2520Components::Operational::APS::Black%2520Box%2520Specification::Requirements::04%2520APS%2520L3%2520Requirements"))
  ?req vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfSource ?link .
  ?link rdf:type ?linkType .
  FILTER(?linkType = vocab:satisfy || ?linkType = vocab:verify)
}
LIMIT 50
